pages.text: Reactors are large multiblocks. They require a $(l:unnamednuclear:reactor_casing)Casing$ and a $(l:unnamednuclear:reactor_controller)Controller$ on the surface. $(br2)The interior can contain $(l:unnamednuclear:fuel_channel)Fuel Channels$, $(l:unnamednuclear:moderator)Moderators$ (like Coal Blocks), and $(l:unnamednuclear:control_channel)Control Rods$.
